_comment: Self-hosted fonts bundled with the app. The card printer reads THIS file to populate the picker's '★ Bundled' group. To add a font: drop a TrueType .ttf under assets/fonts/<dir>/ and add an entry below. jsPDF embeds TrueType (glyf) only — convert .otf/CFF to .ttf first (otf2ttf / fontTools). 'weights' maps CSS weight -> path relative to assets/fonts/. 'cjk': true only if it covers Traditional Chinese (else it drops glyphs on Chinese fields).
